composition_notes: Player positioned left-of-center facing the implied keypad (right side of frame), creating visual tension toward the countdown threat. Tools arranged in tight vertical column on right edge, mimicking urgency of a ticking clock. Slight rotation on A/C tools adds kinetic energy matching the 60-second pressure.
rationale: M9's mission_text centers on a flashing red keypad and 60-second countdown — maximum time pressure. Player pose candidates (03/05/07) suggest focused/reaching/urgent gestures toward right frame where the implied keypad lives. Tools stacked vertically right-side create a 'toolbox under duress' feel — close together, slightly tilted, ready to grab. Composition drives eyes from player → tools → implied threat zone (upper-right), reinforcing the hermetic seal consequence.
